default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website optimization, and upcoming announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is making a funding announcement tomorrow, increasing attention on the company](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [The team is refining their content strategy, balancing blog posts with main index pages](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [A website audit and user experience review is planned in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [LinkedIn post generation for new content is being explored as a potential workflow](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Topics

### Content Refinement and Delivery

  - [Feedback on recent article incorporated, including cloud references and platform comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Delivery message format adjusted: one main point with additional details if needed](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [SEO optimization focuses on value for users rather than keyword stuffing](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team to finalize edits and publish content independently moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### Website Structure and Content Placement

  - [Discussing optimal placement of content between blog and main index](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Considering a "microsite" approach for topic clusters, linking related content](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Short-term plan: publish first article on main blog, reassess strategy for next three articles](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Long-term vision: create richer, interconnected content experiences](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Upcoming Website Audit

  - [Contract being finalized with an agency for a full audit and user experience review](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Audit will cover technical aspects and complement ongoing content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to provide insights from past website restructuring experiences](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### LinkedIn Post Generation

  - [Team exploring the possibility of generating LinkedIn posts for new content](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Not currently a core offering, but GrowthX willing to investigate and potentially develop a workflow](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Decision pending on whether to pursue this or handle in-house for immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### AI Content Detection

  - [No specific AI detector used in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Focus on producing high-quality content rather than avoiding AI detection](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Google's stance: prioritizes high-quality content regardless of AI involvement](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Current articles don't read as machine-generated, maintaining a natural tone](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deliver three articles on Friday for review and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore LinkedIn post generation capabilities and report back by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Prophecy to prepare blog post for publication next week](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy and website structure in alignment with upcoming audit](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Monitor SEO performance as more content is published to track growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/9jb27aZT51SocTby-4bqE-C3RUzHqS29?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)

action_items.description: Determine placement strategy for next 3 articles on website/blog
Assess feasibility of LinkedIn post generation, report back by end of week
